title: Derive did:web from actor URL
description:
Compute did:web from actor URL. did:web is resolvable via HTTPS, serves as current home pointer.

## Derivation
Actor URL: https://example.com/users/alice
did:web: did:web:example.com:users:alice

Rules (did:web spec):
- https:// becomes did:web:
- Path slashes become colons
- Port if non-443: did:web:example.com%3A8080:users:alice

## Notes
- did:web is computed, not stored (derivable from actor URL)
- If actor URL changes (migration), did:web changes (expected)
- did:key stays constant across migrations (the point)

## Acceptance
- [ ] did_web property on actor computes correctly
- [ ] Handles ports, paths, edge cases
- [ ] Round-trips: did:web resolves back to actor
close_reason: did:web derived from domain+username at runtime
